title: Looking for Financial Analyst at Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Looking for Financial Analyst at Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Financial Analyst at our Chandigarh location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited:
Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited!
